Factsheet

Developer:
twotime
Based in Thailand
Release date:
Platforms:
Steam
itch.io
Website:
Regular Price:
$ 9.99

Description

Hotel Purgatory is a fast-paced first person sorting game about sorting souls to where they need to go in the Afterlife. The Afterlife has recently become very crowded. Too crowded. Help with the problem and if you do a job done well enough, you might have a shot at reincarnation!

History

Hotel Purgatory started of as a solo Year 1 final project for the Visual Scripting class.

When the game was accepted to be apart of Bangkok University's Game On! Season 2 program, the project became more ambitious, leading to the formation of twotime to fulfill said ambitions.

Features

  • Pick souls up and chuck them to their respective elevators! You're on the clock here, so be quick about it!
  • Use a variety of gear to complete your quota! From grappling hooks to a gravity inverter, the hotel is YOUR playground to conquer!
  • With a Hard Mode and some extra challenges, employees are sure to have their hands full even AFTER they've completed their shift!

About twotime

Boilerplate
twotime is a game studio formed by a group of university students with the goal of creating creative and experimental games that expresses the team's creativity to the fullest.
